items: Roll Call
Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of Measure S Architectural Pool
Information on 2022-23 Financial and Performance Audits Building Fund (Measure T & S) for RCSD
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of the April 17 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of the Addendum No. 2 to Orion's 2023-24 Measure U Application
Approval of the Addendum to North Star Academy's 2023-24 Measure U Application
Approval of the Second Amendment between the Redwood City School District and Hatchuel Tabernik & Associates for the 2023-2024 School Year
Approval of Amendment No. 1 to the agreement between Redwood City School District and Amergis Educational Staffing Services (formally Maxim Healthcare Services) for 2023-2024
Approval of Additional Personnel Needed for 2024-2025
Ratification of Warrant Registers, April 1, 2024 - April 30, 2024
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - March 2024
Redwood City School District Review of KIPP's Second Interim Financial Report for Fiscal Year 2023-24
Redwood City School District Review of Connect's Second Interim Financial Report for Fiscal Year 2023-24
Redwood City School District Review of Rocketship's Second Interim Financial Report for Fiscal Year 2023-24
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 8.3 (Approval of Addendum No. 2 to Orion's 2023-24 Measure U Application) was pulled from consent agenda and moved to action for individual discussion due to a speaker card.
